positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed geometric mandala pattern centered around stylized celestial themes, featuring interwoven lunar phases, crystalline stars, and abstract constellations. The style should be a blend of Art Deco elegance and mystical graphic illustration. Use a restricted palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant metallic gold, and stark ivory white. Emphasize clean, sharp vector lines, strong silhouettes, and high contrast suitable for single-color screen printing on apparel. The composition must be balanced and centrally focused, avoiding gradients or photorealism.
negative: blurry, out of focus, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, messy, amateur, bad anatomy, grayscale, washed out, gradient, photographic, copyright, logo
